<!-- indicator: fig-brfss-adult-asthma -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: fig-brfss-adult-asthma
#| fig-cap: 'Percentage of Adults with Current Asthma, 2016, 2018, and 2021'
#| fig-alt: 'Data visualization showing Percentage of Adults with Current Asthma, 2016, 2018, and 2021.'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_figure_object
render_figure_object(figure_id="fig-brfss-adult-asthma", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH).show()
```
